questionHtml: The fibres seen on the surface are a distinctive feature of this virus. List two other differences in structure that may occur between viruses.
markschemeHtml:
1. presence of envelope;
  2. genetic material can be DNA or RNA;
  3. presence of enzymes;
  4. different shapes/ rounded or elongated shapes;

meta.title: The fibres seen on the surface are a distinctive feature of this virus. List two other differences in structure that may occur between viruses.
breadcrumbLabels: A2.3.2. Diversity of structure in viruses
